title: Codex CLI Output Suppression & Quiet Runner V0
objectives: Criar runner local silencioso para Codex CLI
Capturar stdout e stderr em arquivo
Extrair métricas compactas e diff-like lines
validation: .venv/bin/python -m app.cli codex-quiet-run --prompt-file <TMP_DIR>/quiet-runner-ok.prompt --cwd <FACTORYOS_ROOT> --model gpt-5.4-mini --reasoning low --sandbox read-only --approval never --label s042-dry-run --dry-run > <TMP_DIR>/s042-quiet-dry-run.json

FACTORYOS_ENABLE_QUIET_CODEX=1 .venv/bin/python -m app.cli codex-quiet-run --prompt-file <TMP_DIR>/quiet-runner-ok.prompt --cwd <FACTORYOS_ROOT> --model gpt-5.4-mini --reasoning low --sandbox read-only --approval never --label s042-real-canary --execute > <TMP_DIR>/s042-quiet-real-run.json
